channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump to Axios: Netanyahu has "no fucking judgment" but Iran deal still on
item.description: President Trump tells Axios the U.S.-Iran deal to end the war is still on track for Sunday despite Israel's strike in Beirut and the Iranian threat to...

item.title: Trump criticizes Israel's Beirut strike, calls for de-escalation as Iran threatens U.S. deal
item.description: A drone strike on northern Israel triggered retaliation: Israel hit Hezbollah in Beirut, and Iran now threatens a U.S. deal.

item.title: Scoop: Trump aides fear Haberman and Swan obtained Situation Room tapes for 'Regime Change'
item.description: Top White House officials believe New York Times reporters Maggie Haberman and Jonathan Swan obtained audio recordings of Situation Room meetings.

item.title: How Amazon and the White House ended Anthropic's Fable
item.description: Anthropic's powerful Fable 5 AI model lasted only days in public hands after an urgent Amazon report triggered a scramble.
